title: Moving item to another board and column mapping by id names

posts.author: swosh (Petr Hnilica)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I wanted to make automation with moving item to another board. Mapping is done by name of columns. I’d like if you add second type of automapping by id names.

Column width is narrow. I’d have typo at the end name. Automapping didn’t worked. Columns had the same id names.
